title: Technical Pegasus
description: Optimal Performace, Quality of Life changes and Aesthetics for the technical players!
body:
# Welcome to Technical Pegasus!

This modpack brings performance, handy quality of life changes and visual improvements together! Targeted at the technical player, new features are added to improve the experience without being too simple or too overwhelming, whilst adding must need mods for technical players like Litematica, Carpet mod and Tweakeroo. If you experience an issue or have a suggestion for this modpack, feel free to let me know in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/YPgxKKb2Mr)!

## Features
- Optimization using performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and many more!
- Shader support
- Hand restock and Inventory sorting
- Saturation level added to the hunger bar
- Minimap and World map
- Additional mods to make building redstone machines and farms much easier and faster

### Mods from Curseforge:

[Malilib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib)

[Tweakeroo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tweakeroo)

[Item Scroller (Original)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-scroller) → The 1.20.1 versions of this modpack use a forked version of the original Item Scroller called [Item Scroller Crafting Fix](https://github.com/Andrews54757/itemscroller-crafting-fix)

[Minihud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud)

[Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica)
